ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_unique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team within a league */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "coach_since" INTEGER /* Year the current coach started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "team_id_against" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the team */,
  "team_concede" INTEGER /* Total score conceded by the team */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* True if the match was played at home, False otherwise */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Summary of the match result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_against FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_against") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "promoted_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams promoted to the next higher league */,
  "relegated_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams relegated to the next lower league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "joined_team" INTEGER /* Year the player joined the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Possession percentage of the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
